The '''Taroonian Civil War''' was a twenty-year long conflict fought between the neighboring planets of [[Kuan]] and [[Bordal]] in the [[Taroon system/Legends|Taroon system]]. The conflict claimed many lives and created a constant state of warfare within the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] system. It was brought to an end by the arrival of [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance II|''Vengeance'']], commanded by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Mordon (Human)|Mordon]], which instituted martial law and began the disarmament process.
